tagline: One family. Many focused Sathi apps.

apps.name: Pariksha Sathi
apps.tagline: Plan your preparation, day by day.
apps.description: Study planner for competitive exams with exam registry, syllabus-aware planning, PDF export, checklist, streaks, and cloud sync.

apps.name: Rozgar Sathi
apps.description: Sarkari jobs portal with vacancy listing, resume builder, application tracker, shared Google login, and PWA install support.

apps.name: Samachar Sathi
apps.description: Current affairs and daily analysis app with local vault storage, archive flow, admin import, shared auth hooks, and PWA support.

apps.name: Hisaab Sathi
apps.tagline: Daily finance and udhar ledger in one place.
apps.description: Expense, income, udhar given, udhar returned, Gmail backup fallback, reminder support, and mobile-first ledger flow.

apps.name: Antariksh Sathi
apps.tagline: Sky events, ISRO watch, and stargazing in one orbit.
apps.description: Offline-first space companion with meteor showers, eclipse markers, ISRO mission watch, India stargazing spots by state, agency directory, and a student curiosity lab.

apps.name: Ganit Sathi
apps.tagline: Calculator, converters, and age utility in one premium studio.
apps.description: TypeScript-first utility app with normal and scientific calculator, daily currency sync, multi-category unit conversion, age calculator, shared family login, and cloud-ready preferences.
